answers.where: A compact low-poly city block intersection with roads, grass lots, car, simple buildings, streetlight and HUD.
answers.action: HUD gives package/car verbs; pickup and reward screenshots prove the loop, but the package/route still needs stronger world marker.
answers.response: Pickup changes HUD to deliver, raises WANTED 1, and toy blaster stun feedback appears.
answers.reward: Job complete gives CASH  and next job locked text.
answers.game_look: Reads as a low-poly toy city prototype now, but still sparse and flat compared with target.

issues.text: The package/route target is still not visually obvious enough in the world.
The intersection reads, but the city is sparse and flat.

not_covered.reason: retry text captured in pickup-stress, but no separate restart screen yet

problem: Review: state coverage is stronger and ground blocker is fixed; strict pass waits on package/route affordance and denser city composition.
next: Add a visible package/route marker or mission beacon, then rerun capture_states.py and strict gate.
